review_notes: The functions map well to Kubernetes RBAC controls relevant to enforcing least privilege. However, the function 'k8s_rbac_minimal_privileges_assigned' was slightly vague, and specifying 'to_users' improves clarity. All function names generally follow the naming conventions and are descriptive.
naming_improvements: Consider specifying the target of privilege assignment in 'k8s_rbac_minimal_privileges_assigned' for better clarity.
title: Least Privilege
step1_reasoning: The FedRAMP AC-6 control focuses on enforcing least privilege, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC configurations. Ensuring that no users or service accounts have cluster-admin bindings, enforcing least privilege by assigning the minimal set of permissions necessary, and limiting the scope of role bindings are all critical to implementing least privilege in Kubernetes.
